title: An Act promoting recreation on Massachusetts beaches

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Sweezey of Duxbury, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Kenneth P. Sweezey relative to over-sand vehicle access and other recreational activities on beaches.  Environment and Natural Resources.
